ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user (in kilograms) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the device was registered */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., walking, running) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "calorie_burn_rate" REAL /* Calorie burn rate for the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that generated the reading */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reading */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the reading */,
  "wrist" INTEGER /* Wrist where the device is worn (0 for left, 1 for right) */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "acceleration_x" REAL /* X-axis acceleration reading */,
  "acceleration_y" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration reading */,
  "acceleration_z" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration reading */,
  "gyro_x" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope reading */,
  "gyro_y" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope reading */,
  "gyro_z" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope reading */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate reading */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_pref" INTEGER /* Preference for receiving notifications (true for on, false for off) */,
  "activity_goal" INTEGER /* Daily activity goal in steps */,
  "daily_reminder_time" TEXT /* Time for daily activity reminders */,
  "preferred_units" TEXT /* Preferred units for distance and height (e.g., metric, imperial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_settings" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of sensor readings (in Hz) */,
  "acceleration_range" TEXT /* Range of acceleration sensor (e.g., ±2g, ±4g) */,
  "gyro_range" TEXT /* Range of gyroscope sensor (e.g., ±250°/s, ±500°/s) */,
  "heart_rate_monitoring" INTEGER /* Heart rate monitoring enabled (true for on, false for off) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator or data analyst who accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose data was changed */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data changed (e.g., activity log, sensor reading) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was changed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of external data source (e.g., heart rate monitor, GPS device) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrated_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrated data point */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose data was integrated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data integrated (e.g., heart rate, GPS coordinates) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was integrated */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the integrated data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrated_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrated_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity classification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose activity was classified */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the classified activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the classified activity */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the classification (between 0 and 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_classifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_classifications_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_id")
)
